items.name: Protector's Gladius
items.description: This remarkable gladius holds significance for both the Roman Emperor's imperial family and the Praetorian Guard. The gladius features a precisely crafted golden hilt, adorned with intricate engravings that pay homage to the emperor's imperial lineage. The grip is wrapped in sumptuous purple leather, a regal hue that signifies the esteemed position of both the emperor's family and the Praetorian Guard. Regardless of who wears this elegant weapon on their side, it reflects the unyielding power, honor, and legacy of the Roman Empire.

items.name: Sneakers by The Power of Words x Diverge
items.description: Stylish sneakers are designed to perfectly complement the Resilience Hoodie Dress by The Power of Words x Diverge. https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18278766718/Joy-Hoodie-Dress-by-The-Power-of-Words-x-Diverge  The program's direct impact involves expressing emotions through 7 wearables, fostering self-expression and building connections. This creates a strong sense of community and empowerment through helping others, addressing feelings of loneliness and isolation with positive outcomes, and helping build EQ.
